basics.name: Xiaosi Zhang
basics.label: Senior Software Systems Engineer
basics.summary: Senior Software Systems Engineer with a Ph.D. from Vanderbilt University, working at the intersection of semiconductor systems, computer vision, and machine learning. Designs scalable end-to-end solutions for registration, defect detection, and robust matching in structured environments.

education.institution: Huazhong University of Science and Technology

awards.title: Hamilton Fellowship
awards.summary: Fellowship awarded to support doctoral studies.
